input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #5777 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.google.api.grpc:proto-google-cloud-bigquerystorage-v1beta2:0.191.2; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Do not add the higher-level BigQuery Storage client or gRPC stub artifacts unless a specific test requires them; this issue targets the proto artifact, whose normal classpath already brings protobuf, proto-google-common-protos, api-common, and Guava transitively.
Avoid live BigQuery calls or ADC/authentication-dependent tests; for this artifact, descriptor and message behavior should be tested offline.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The artifact is a proto-only BigQuery Storage v1beta2 library; meaningful coverage is reachable through generated protobuf messages, resource-name helpers, descriptors, enum/value maps, and serialization round trips without external services or extra runtime setup.
